response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'Run Back 'Round' from on-screen text. 2. Identified performer as 'hololive English -Promise-' (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Nanashi Mumei). 3. Used the search query ' "Run Back 'Round" Hololive Promise lyrics' to locate the official English lyrics. 4. Verified the song is primarily in English, with minor Japanese phrases. 5. Mapped scenes based on dialogue and song performance segments.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual stage performance by the hololive English group 'Promise' (comprising IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Nanashi Mumei). The performance consists of their song 'Run Back 'Round', with both a staged introduction/announcement segment and a choreographed musical performance segment.

scenes.description: The video begins with the three characters on a virtual city stage, with conversational dialogue and announcements regarding a 'final announcement' and the release of their new song.
The characters perform the song 'Run Back 'Round'. On-screen text displays the song title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Up with the moonlight,
Down in the streetlights,
Looking for a spotlight,
Making my move
(Whoa) I'm running
(Whoa) 行こう！
Days like a whirlwind,
Don't stop coming,
Got me in a tailspin,
What can I do?
(Whoa) Keep running
(Whoa) 行こう！
Lost and found,
back to where I started,
I won't stay down,
trust me, I can do it!
I live life loud,
take it to the limit,
So stand up proud,
now I'm gonna sing it!
Run back 'round,
it's a new beginning,
I run back 'round,
got to keep believing,
I run back 'round,
I know where I'm going,
I run back 'round,
nothing's gonna stop me now!
(Whoa, oh, oh!)
I'm gonna run back 'round
Sparks on the pavement,
Dreams in the distance,
Gotta be relentless,
Faster than sound.
(Whoa) Keep running
(Whoa) 行こう！
